Dracula Untold (2014)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $55,991,880Details
International Box Office $164,249,843
Worldwide Box Office $220,241,723
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $10,508,893
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $8,152,378
Total $18,661,271
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Dracula Untold is the origin story of the man who became Dracula.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$23,514,615 (42.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.38 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:25.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$70,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,887 opening theaters/2,900 max. theaters, 4.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $81,966,078

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 10th, 2014 (Wide) by Universal
October 10th, 2014 (IMAX) by Universal
International Releases: October 1st, 2014 (Wide) (Belgium)
October 2nd, 2014 (Wide) (Australia)
October 2nd, 2014 (Wide) (Croatia)
October 3rd, 2014 (Wide) (Austria)
October 3rd, 2014 (Wide) (Estonia)
Video Release: February 3rd, 2015 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of warfare, vampire attacks, disturbing images, and some sensuality.
(Rating bulletin 2337, 8/27/2014)
Running Time: 92 minutes
Franchise: Dark Universe
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Faustian, Monster, Origin Story, Vampire
Subgenre: Action Horror
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Legendary Pictures, Relativity Media, Michael De Luca Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
